title: AIKernel Canonical Trajectory Governance (CTG): A Three-Council Gateway for Deterministic AI Personality OS Architecture
description: This technical note introduces Canonical Trajectory Governance (CTG), an AIKernel governance theory for admitting stochastic LLM-generated candidate actions into deterministic operating-system control. CTG evaluates each action through Logos, Ethos, and Pathos councils, gives Ethos canonical veto authority, and defines trajectory validity as the product of step-level gates. The paper also clarifies the relationship between CTG and the AIKernel Prime-Phase Model (PPM), repositioning PPM as a mathematical substrate for state-space and memory-protection research rather than as the runtime decision gateway. The English manuscript is canonical; the Japanese manuscript is included as a companion translation.
